user.title: Home Keeper
user.description: Set up Home Keeper to track home maintenance and chores. Manage your tasks from the Home Keeper panel in the sidebar.

abort.already_configured: Home Keeper is already set up.

add_task.name: Add task
add_task.description: Create a new maintenance task or chore.

recurrence_type.name: Recurrence type
recurrence_type.description: floating (measured from completion) or fixed (anchored schedule).

interval.name: Interval
interval.description: Repeat every N units (floating) or steps (fixed).

unit.name: Unit
unit.description: For floating tasks: days, weeks, or months.

freq.name: Frequency
freq.description: For fixed tasks: DAILY, WEEKLY, or MONTHLY.

anchor.name: Anchor
anchor.description: For fixed tasks: ISO datetime of the first occurrence (sets the time of day).

last_completed.name: Last completed
last_completed.description: Optional 'last done' date. Seeds an initial completion so a floating task starts measured from this date (next due = last done + interval) instead of being due immediately. Omit for a task that has never been done.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Optional device to attach this task to.

area_id.name: Area
area_id.description: Optional area to associate with this task.

update_task.name: Update task
update_task.description: Update fields of an existing task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to update.

anchor.name: Anchor
anchor.description: ISO datetime of the first occurrence (fixed).

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Device to attach this task to.

area_id.name: Area
area_id.description: Area to associate with this task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to delete.

force.name: Force
force.description: Bypass deletion protection for a task managed by another integration. Use this to clean up a task whose managing integration was uninstalled or is misbehaving and can't remove it itself.

complete_task.name: Complete task
complete_task.description: Mark a task complete and advance its recurrence.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The id of the task to complete.

list_tasks.name: List tasks
list_tasks.description: Return all tasks as a response.

add_asset.name: Add appliance
add_asset.description: Register an appliance/asset. By default Home Keeper creates a virtual device for it; set kind to existing to attach metadata to a device from another integration.

name.name: Name
name.description: Display name (required for a new virtual device).

kind.name: Kind
kind.description: virtual (Home Keeper creates the device) or existing (attach to one).

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Existing device to attach metadata to (required when kind is existing).

warranty_expiry.name: Warranty expiry
warranty_expiry.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Surfaced as a date sensor on the device.

manual_url.name: Manual URL
manual_url.description: Link to the manual or docs.

parts.name: Parts
parts.description: Structured parts/wear items; wear items with an interval drive a maintenance task.

parent_asset_id.name: Parent appliance
parent_asset_id.description: Make this a subdevice of another appliance.

related_device_ids.name: Related devices
related_device_ids.description: Other registry devices to associate with this appliance.

update_asset.name: Update appliance
update_asset.description: Update fields of an existing appliance/asset.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the asset to update.

manual_url.name: Manual URL
manual_url.description: Link to the manual or docs.

parts.name: Parts
parts.description: Structured parts/wear items; wear items with an interval drive a maintenance task.

parent_asset_id.name: Parent appliance
parent_asset_id.description: Make this a subdevice of another appliance.

related_device_ids.name: Related devices
related_device_ids.description: Other registry devices to associate with this appliance.

delete_asset.name: Delete appliance
delete_asset.description: Delete an appliance/asset. Its virtual device (if any) is removed and tasks attached to it become standalone.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the asset to delete.

list_assets.name: List appliances
list_assets.description: Return all appliances/assets as a response.

adjust_part_stock.name: Adjust part stock
adjust_part_stock.description: Change a part's on-hand spare count by a signed delta (clamped at zero). When a decrease reaches or crosses the reorder threshold, a low-stock event fires.

asset_id.name: Asset ID
asset_id.description: The id of the appliance the part belongs to.

part_id.name: Part ID
part_id.description: The id of the part whose stock to adjust.

delta.name: Delta
delta.description: Signed change to apply to the spare count (e.g. -1 to consume, 2 to restock).

export_inventory.name: Export inventory
export_inventory.description: Return a home inventory for insurance as a response (one row per appliance plus totals), with a ready-to-save CSV under the "csv" key.
